content.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders (@SenSanders) I spoke to Anthropic’s AI agent Claude about AI collecting massive amounts of personal data and how that information is being used to violate our privacy rights. What an AI agent says about the dangers of AI is shocking and should wake us up. Video — https://nitter.net/SenSanders/status/2034715260259557597#m
